Vocabulary - जयस्य कारणम् | Story 12

27 Apr 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
तरुण young
प्रचलति proceed
तत्रत्य of that place
दातुं in order to give
वस्तुतः in fact
पृष्ट questioned

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
कियद् इति दातुं शक्यम्? How much can you give ?
कोऽपि अधिकं करं दातुं न इच्छति No one is happy about having to pay more taxes.
भवत्याः कृते दातुं मम समीपे बहूनि कार्याणि सन्ति I’ve got plenty of jobs to keep you busy.
   
वस्तुतः किं जातम् ? So what actually happened?
वस्तुतः महनीयम् एतत् It is really great.
   
बालकः मातरं पृष्टवान् The boy asked his mother.
भवान् तं न पृष्टवान् खलु ? You didn’t ask him, did you?
एकं प्रश्नं सा मां पृष्टवती She asked me a question.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
